The '''''Imperator''''' was an [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperator''-class Star Destroyer]] in the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]].

==History==
The ''Imperator''{{'s}} name was shared with [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|its line]] of [[Warship/Legends|warship]].

In [[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]], the [[Starship/Legends|vessel]], under [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] command, launched an [[Battle of AX-456|attack]] on the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] base on [[AX-456]] along with [[Sergeant major/Legends|Sergeant major]] [[Hong]] and [[Stormtrooper/Legends|Stormtrooper]] [[Briggs (stormtrooper)|Briggs]]; this particular mission also served as the [[Omega Exercise]] for [[Kyle Katarn]], a [[Cadet/Legends|cadet]] at the [[Imperial Academy/Legends|Imperial Academy]].

The [[Capital ship/Legends|capital ship]] was later sent to pick up the brainwashed double agent [[Kupalo]] as he attempted to flee from the Rebel [[Cruiser/Legends|cruiser]] [[Liberty/Legends|''Liberty'']]. Despite the ''Imperator''{{'s}} arrival and the [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE Fighters]] she launched into the fray, the former ship was unable to prevent the Rebels from recapturing Kupalo and fleeing into [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]].

[[Time/Legends|Subsequently]], in [[3 ABY/Legends|3 ABY]], the ''Imperator'' joined the forces of rogue [[Grand Admiral/Legends|Grand Admiral]] [[Demetrius Zaarin|Zaarin]], and helped destroy the [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] [[Courageous (Imperial-class)|''Courageous'']].

{{Ship-stub}}
